---
title: "Make Figures"
author: "Kendra Wyant"
date: "`r lubridate::today()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true 
    toc_depth: 4
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Temporary script to explore options for partial dependence plots

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

suppressMessages(library(tidyverse))
suppressMessages(library(tidymodels))
suppressMessages(library(patchwork))

devtools::source_url("https://github.com/jjcurtin/lab_support/blob/main/format_path.R?raw=true")
devtools::source_url("https://github.com/jjcurtin/lab_support/blob/main/chtc/static_files/fun_chtc.R?raw=true")

path_models <- format_path(str_c("risk2/models/combined"))
path_shared <- format_path(str_c("risk2/data_processed/shared"))
path_chtc <- format_path(str_c("risk2/chtc/combined/train_xgboost_kfold_1_x_5_v10_full_final/input"))

# ungrouped shaps
shaps <- read_rds(here::here(path_models, "shaps_1_x_5_day_v10_kfold_full_final.rds")) |> 
  glimpse()

# training controls
source(here::here(path_chtc, "training_controls.R"))
```


### Transform Z-score back to raw value for each individual features


Read in raw features 
```{r}
feat <- read_csv(here::here(path_shared, "features_combined_24h_v10.csv"),
                 show_col_types = FALSE) 
```

Reproduce 1x5 splits from final model.
```{r}
feat <- format_data(feat) |> 
  arrange(label_num) |>
  mutate(id_obs = 1:nrow(feat)) 

splits <- feat |> 
    make_splits(cv_resample_type = "kfold", cv_resample = cv_resample, 
                cv_outer_resample = NULL, cv_inner_resample = NULL, 
                cv_group, cv_strat = cv_strat, the_seed = seed_splits)
```


Run recipe and calculate mean and SD for each variable in each split
```{r}
get_mean_sd <- function(split_num, splits, config_best, rec){
  
  d_in <- training(splits$splits[[split_num]]) |> 
    select(-id_obs)  # not used for training; only needed in d_out to tag for later joins 
  
  d_out <- testing(splits$splits[[split_num]]) 
  
  rec <- build_recipe(d = d_in, config = config_best)

  rec_prepped <- rec |> 
    prep(training = d_in)

  feat_in <- rec_prepped |> 
    bake(new_data = NULL) |> 
    select(-y)
  
  # Calculate mean and SD for every feat in training
  feat_in <- feat_in |> 
    summarise(across(where(is.numeric),
                     list(mean = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
                          sd = ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)))) |> 
    pivot_longer(everything(),
                 names_to = c("variable", ".value"),
                 names_pattern = "(.+)_(mean|sd)$")
  
  # save values with id_obs in test
   feat_in |> 
     mutate(split_num = split_num)
}
```

Get config best for making recipe
```{r}
(config_best <- 
  read_csv(here::here(path_models, "inner_metrics_1_x_5_day_v10_kfold_full_final.csv"),
           show_col_types = FALSE) |> 
  group_by(algorithm, feature_set, hp1, hp2, hp3, resample) |> 
   summarize(roc_auc = median(roc_auc),
             n_jobs = n(), .groups = "drop") |> 
  relocate(n_jobs) |> 
  arrange(desc(roc_auc)) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup())
```

Overwrite training controls build_recipe function without z-scoring or bring to fence
```{r}
build_recipe <- function(d, config) {
  # d: (training) dataset from which to build recipe
  # config: single-row config-specific tibble

  # get relevant info from job (algorithm, feature_set, resample, under_ratio)
  algorithm <- config$algorithm
  feature_set <- config$feature_set

  if (config$resample == "none") {
    resample <- config$resample
  } else {
    resample <- str_split(config$resample, "_")[[1]][1]
    ratio <- as.numeric(str_split(config$resample, "_")[[1]][2])
  }

  # Set recipe steps generalizable to all model configurations
  rec <- recipe(y ~ ., data = d)  |>
    step_rm(label_num, subid)

  if(cv_strat) {
    rec <- rec |>
      step_rm(strat) # remove strat variable
  }

  rec <- rec |>
    step_zv(all_predictors()) |>
    step_impute_median(all_numeric_predictors()) |>
    step_impute_mode(all_nominal_predictors()) |>
    step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors(), one_hot = TRUE) |>
    # step_normalize(all_predictors()) |>
    # bring to fence outliers with Z scores > |5|
    # step_mutate_at(all_predictors(), fn = ~ pmax(pmin(., 5), -5)) |>
    step_nzv(all_predictors())

  return(rec)
}
```



Get means and sds for splits
```{r}
d <- 1:length(splits$splits) |> 
  map(\(split_num) get_mean_sd(split_num, splits, config_best, rec)) |> 
  list_rbind()
```

Get test id_obs from splits and add split num to shapley
```{r}
split_id_obs <- map_dfr(seq_along(splits$splits),
                        \(i) {
                          testing(splits$splits[[i]]) |>
                            distinct(id_obs) |>
                            mutate(split = i)
                          })

shaps <- shaps |> 
  left_join(split_id_obs, by = "id_obs")
```


Join means and sds to shapleys   
- note: mean_value = the mean raw feature value of that feature across the training data (not used by us)
```{r}
shaps <- shaps |> 
  left_join(d, by = c("variable", "split" = "split_num")) |> 
  glimpse()
```


Calculate raw feature score
```{r}
shaps_raw <- shaps |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(rfvalue_raw = rfvalue*sd + mean) |> 
  glimpse()

# save out
# shaps_raw |>
#   write_rds(here::here(path_models, "shaps_1_x_5_day_v10_kfold_full_final_raw.rds"))
```


### Regroup and plot

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| code-fold: true

shaps_grp <- shaps_raw |>
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable, ".lapse") & 
                                  str_detect(variable, "l0.r"),
                                "Past opioid use, Raw (EMA)",
                                variable),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "urge.") & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Urge, Raw (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "pain") & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"),
                                "Pain, Raw (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "risk.p")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"),
                                "Risky situation, Raw (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "hassle") & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"),
                                "Stressful event, Raw (EMA)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "pleasant.p")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"),
                                "Pleasant event, Raw (EMA)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "sleep")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"),
                                "Sleep, Raw (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "happy") & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"),
                                "Happy, Raw (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "angry")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Angry, Raw (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "anxious")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"),
                                "Anxious, Raw (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "relaxed") & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"),
                                "Relaxed, Raw (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "depressed")& 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"),
                                "Depressed, Raw (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "motivation")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"),
                                "Abstinence motivation, Raw (EMA)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "confidence") & 
                                  (str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r") | 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "rvar_")),
                                "Abstinence confidence, Raw (EMA)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "count.ema") & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"),
                                "Completed surveys, Raw (other)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "missed_dose") & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"),
                                "Missed MOUD, Raw (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "drug_alcohol")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"),
                                "Alcohol use, Raw (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "drug_cannabis")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"),
                                "Cannabis use, Raw (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "drug_stimulant")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"),
                                "Stimulant use, Raw (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "drug_sedative")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"),
                                "Sedative use, Raw (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "drug_inhalant")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"),
                                "Inhalant use, Raw (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "drug_halluc")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"),
                                "Hallucinogen use, Raw (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "age"),
                                "Age (demographic)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "education"),
                                "Education (demographic)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "income"), 
                                "Income (demographic)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "var_location") & 
                                 str_detect(variable_grp, "rvar_"),
                                "Location variance, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "evening_out") & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"),
                                "Evening out, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "harm.Moderately")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Harmful locations, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "harm.Considerably")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Harmful locations, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "harm.Extremely")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Harmful locations, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "harm.Mildly")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Harmful locations, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "harm.Not at all")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Helpful locations, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "help.Moderately")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Helpful locations, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "help.Considerably")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Helpful locations, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "help.Extremely")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Helpful locations, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "help.Mildly")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Helpful locations, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "help.Not at all")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Harmful locations, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "unpleasant.Most of the time")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Unpleasant locations, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "unpleasant.Always")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Unpleasant locations, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "unpleasant.Sometimes")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Unpleasant locations, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "pleasant.Rarely")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Unpleasant locations, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "pleasant.Never")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Unpleasant locations, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "pleasant.Most of the time")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Pleasant locations, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "pleasant.Always")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Pleasant locations, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "pleasant.Sometimes")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Pleasant locations, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "unpleasant.Never")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Pleasant locations, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "unpleasant.Rarely")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Pleasant locations, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "work") & 
                                  (str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r") | 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "rvar_")), 
                                "Work, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "physical_health_care")  & 
                                  (str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r") | 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "rvar_")), 
                                "Physical health care, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "take_classes")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Classes, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "moud")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "MOUD, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "mental_health") & 
                                  (str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r") | 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "rvar_")), 
                                "Mental health care, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "volunteer")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Volunteer, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "time_with_family")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Time with family, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "relax") & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"),
                                "Relax, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "religious") & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Religious, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "time_with_friends") & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Time with friends, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "socialize")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Socialize with new people, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "drink_alchol")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.r"), 
                                "Drink alcohol, Raw (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "geography"),
                                "Geography (demographic)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, ".lapse") & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Past opioid use, Diff (EMA)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "urge.")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Urge, Diff (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "pain") & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Pain, Diff (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "risk.p")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Risky situation, Diff (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "hassle")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Stressful event, Diff (EMA)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "pleasant.p")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Pleasant event, Diff (EMA)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "sleep")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Sleep, Diff (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "happy")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Happy, Diff (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "angry")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Angry, Diff (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "anxious")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Anxious, Diff (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "relaxed") & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Relaxed, Diff (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "depressed") & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Depressed, Diff (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "motivation")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Abstinence motivation, Diff (EMA)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "confidence")  & 
                                 str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Abstinence confidence, Diff (EMA)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "count.ema")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Completed surveys, Diff (other)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "missed_dose")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Missed MOUD, Diff (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "drug_alcohol")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Alcohol use, Diff (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "drug_cannabis")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Cannabis use, Diff (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "drug_stimulant")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Stimulant use, Diff (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "drug_sedative")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Sedative use, Diff (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "drug_inhalant")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Inhalant use, Diff (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "drug_halluc")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Hallucinogen use, Diff (EMA)", 
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "var_location")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "dvar_"),
                                "Location variance, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "evening_out")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Evening out, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "harm.Moderately")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Harmful locations, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "harm.Considerably")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Harmful locations, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "harm.Extremely")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Harmful locations, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "harm.Mildly")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Harmful locations, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "harm.Not at all")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Helpful locations, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "help.Moderately")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Helpful locations, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "help.Considerably")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Helpful locations, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "help.Extremely")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Helpful locations, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "help.Mildly")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Helpful locations, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "help.Not at all")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Harmful locations, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "unpleasant.Most of the time")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Unpleasant locations, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "unpleasant.Always")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Unpleasant locations, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "unpleasant.Sometimes")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Unpleasant locations, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "pleasant.Rarely")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Unpleasant locations, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "pleasant.Never")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Unpleasant locations, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "pleasant.Most of the time")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Pleasant locations, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "pleasant.Always")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Pleasant locations, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "pleasant.Sometimes")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Pleasant locations, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "unpleasant.Never")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Pleasant locations, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "unpleasant.Rarely")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Pleasant locations, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "work")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Work, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "physical_health_care")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Physical health care, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "take_classes")  & 
                                 str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Classes, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "moud")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "MOUD, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "mental_health")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Mental health care, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "volunteer")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Volunteer, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "time_with_family")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Time with family, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "relax")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"),
                                "Relax, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "religious")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Religious, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "time_with_friends")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Time with friends, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "socialize")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Socialize with new people, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp),
         variable_grp = if_else(str_detect(variable_grp, "drink_alchol")  & 
                                  str_detect(variable_grp, "l0.d"), 
                                "Drink alcohol, Diff (gps)",
                                variable_grp)) |> 
  group_by(id_obs, variable_grp) |> 
  summarize(value = sum(value),
            rfvalue_z = mean(rfvalue),
            rfvalue_raw = mean(rfvalue_raw))
  
# shaps_grp |>
#   write_rds(here::here(path_models, "shapsgrp_1_x_5_day_v10_kfold_full_final_raw.rds"))
```

```{r}
#| echo: false

shaps_grp <- read_rds(here::here(path_models, "shapsgrp_1_x_5_day_v10_kfold_full_final_raw.rds"))
```



```{r}
#| label: fig-4
#| fig-cap: "Shapley-feature value partial dependence plots. The plots display the relationship between the Shapley value and mean raw feature value for the top 20 important features. The blue lines represent the estimated smooth functions from generalized additive models."
#| message: false
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 14
#| code-fold: true

shap_levels <- shaps_grp |>
  group_by(variable_grp) |>
  summarize(mean_value = mean(abs(value)), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(desc(mean_value)) |>
  slice_head(n = 20) |>
  pull(variable_grp)

dem_vars <- c("Age (demographic)", "Geography (demographic)")

shaps_grp |>
  filter(variable_grp %in% shap_levels) |>
  mutate(variable_grp = factor(variable_grp, levels = shap_levels)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = rfvalue_raw, y = value)) +
  geom_point(alpha = .3) +
  geom_smooth(data = ~ dplyr::filter(.x, !variable_grp %in% c(dem_vars)),
              method = "gam",
              formula = y ~ s(x, k = 30),
              method.args = list(method = "REML"),
              se = FALSE) +
  geom_smooth(data = ~ dplyr::filter(.x, variable_grp %in% dem_vars),
              method = "gam",
              formula = y ~ s(x, k = 4),
              method.args = list(method = "REML"),
              se = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ variable_grp, scales = "free", ncol = 4) +
  labs(title = NULL,
       x = "Raw feature score",
       y = "Shapley value") +
  theme_classic()
 # theme_classic(base_size = 18) 

# knitr::include_graphics(path = here::here("figures/shapley_local.png"), error = FALSE)
```

### Look at separate feature plots

#### Raw Urge

All have same pattern 

```{r}
shaps_raw |>
  filter(variable == "urge.p168.l0.rmax_response") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = rfvalue_raw, y = value)) +
  geom_point(alpha = .3) +
  labs(title = NULL,
       x = "Raw feature score",
       y = "Shapley value") +
  theme_classic()

shaps_raw |>
  filter(variable == "urge.p168.l0.rmin_response") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = rfvalue_raw, y = value)) +
  geom_point(alpha = .3) +
  labs(title = NULL,
       x = "Raw feature score",
       y = "Shapley value") +
  theme_classic()

shaps_raw |>
  filter(variable == "urge.p168.l0.rmedian_response") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = rfvalue_raw, y = value)) +
  geom_point(alpha = .3) +
  labs(title = NULL,
       x = "Raw feature score",
       y = "Shapley value") +
  theme_classic()

shaps_raw |>
  filter(variable == "urge.p0.l0.rrecent_response") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = rfvalue_raw, y = value)) +
  geom_point(alpha = .3) +
  labs(title = NULL,
       x = "Raw feature score",
       y = "Shapley value") +
  theme_classic()
```




#### Diff Religious Places

Note: only diff features in model suggesting this was relatively infrequent in our sample. 
```{r}
shaps_raw |>
  filter(variable == "p24.l0.dratesum_duration.religious.yes") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = rfvalue_raw, y = value)) +
  geom_point(alpha = .3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam",
              formula = y ~ s(x, k = 30),
              method.args = list(method = "REML"),
              se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = NULL,
       x = "Raw feature score",
       y = "Shapley value") +
  theme_classic()

shaps_raw |>
  filter(variable == "p168.l0.dratesum_duration.religious.yes") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = rfvalue_raw, y = value)) +
  geom_point(alpha = .3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam",
              formula = y ~ s(x, k = 30),
              method.args = list(method = "REML"),
              se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = NULL,
       x = "Raw feature score",
       y = "Shapley value") +
  theme_classic()

```


#### Raw Helpful Locations

Extremely helpful

```{r}
shaps_raw |>
  filter(variable == "p168.l0.rratesum_duration.help.Extremely") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = rfvalue_raw, y = value)) +
  geom_point(alpha = .3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam",
              formula = y ~ s(x, k = 30),
              method.args = list(method = "REML"),
              se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = NULL,
       x = "Raw feature score",
       y = "Shapley value") +
  theme_classic()

shaps_raw |>
  filter(variable == "p24.l0.rratesum_duration.help.Extremely") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = rfvalue_raw, y = value)) +
  geom_point(alpha = .3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam",
              formula = y ~ s(x, k = 30),
              method.args = list(method = "REML"),
              se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = NULL,
       x = "Raw feature score",
       y = "Shapley value") +
  theme_classic()

```

Not at all helpful (currently grouped in harmful locations - not sure why negative relationship with lapse)

```{r}
shaps_raw |>
  filter(variable == "p168.l0.rratesum_duration.help.Not at all") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = rfvalue_raw, y = value)) +
  geom_point(alpha = .3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam",
              formula = y ~ s(x, k = 30),
              method.args = list(method = "REML"),
              se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = NULL,
       x = "Raw feature score",
       y = "Shapley value") +
  theme_classic()

shaps_raw |>
  filter(variable == "p24.l0.rratesum_duration.help.Not at all") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = rfvalue_raw, y = value)) +
  geom_point(alpha = .3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam",
              formula = y ~ s(x, k = 30),
              method.args = list(method = "REML"),
              se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = NULL,
       x = "Raw feature score",
       y = "Shapley value") +
  theme_classic()

```

#### Raw Harmful Locations

Raw extremely AND considerably harmful not in model  

Moderately

```{r}
shaps_raw |>
  filter(variable == "p168.l0.rratesum_duration.harm.Moderately") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = rfvalue_raw, y = value)) +
  geom_point(alpha = .3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam",
              formula = y ~ s(x, k = 30),
              method.args = list(method = "REML"),
              se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = NULL,
       x = "Raw feature score",
       y = "Shapley value") +
  theme_classic()

```

Not at all harmful (currently grouped in helpful locations)

```{r}
shaps_raw |>
  filter(variable == "p168.l0.rratesum_duration.harm.Not at all") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = rfvalue_raw, y = value)) +
  geom_point(alpha = .3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam",
              formula = y ~ s(x, k = 30),
              method.args = list(method = "REML"),
              se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = NULL,
       x = "Raw feature score",
       y = "Shapley value") +
  theme_classic()

shaps_raw |>
  filter(variable == "p24.l0.rratesum_duration.harm.Not at all") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = rfvalue_raw, y = value)) +
  geom_point(alpha = .3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam",
              formula = y ~ s(x, k = 30),
              method.args = list(method = "REML"),
              se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = NULL,
       x = "Raw feature score",
       y = "Shapley value") +
  theme_classic()

```
